seoTitle: How to Add Users in Freshdesk
metaDescription: Learn how to add new agents or customer contacts as users in Freshdesk so your team and customers can start using the help desk.
intro: Whether you're onboarding a new support agent or adding a customer contact, Freshdesk makes it straightforward to add users to your account. This guide walks through the process step by step.

steps.heading: Go to the admin panel
steps.body: Log in as an administrator and open the section for managing agents or contacts.

steps.heading: Choose the user type
steps.body: Decide whether you're adding an internal agent or an external customer contact, since the process differs slightly for each.

steps.heading: Enter the user's details
steps.body: Fill in the name, email address, and any relevant role or permission settings for the new user.

steps.heading: Send the invitation
steps.body: Save the new user, which typically triggers an invitation email so they can set up their account access.

faq.question: Who can add new users in Freshdesk?
faq.answer: Adding users, especially agents, generally requires administrator permissions on the account.

faq.question: Is there a limit to how many users I can add?
faq.answer: Agent limits are tied to your Freshdesk plan, while customer contacts are usually unlimited.

faq.question: Can I set different permission levels for users?
faq.answer: Yes, agents can be assigned different roles and permission levels depending on their responsibilities.

faq.question: Do new users need to confirm their account?
faq.answer: Yes, new agents and contacts typically receive an email invitation they need to accept to activate their account.
